news.title: Meta steals a tactic from Tesla and builds data centers in tents
news.summary: Meta may have one found one way to slash its massive data center bill: tents.

news.title: Apple approves Poke as the first AI agent on its Messages for Business platform
news.summary: Poke, the startup that lets people use AI agents through simple text messages, has become the first AI agent approved for Apple’s Messages for Business platform.

news.title: Helion, the Sam Altman-backed fusion startup, raises $465M to build a power plant for Microsoft
news.summary: Fusion startup Helion is racing to complete a power plant for Microsoft by 2028. A fresh infusion of cash should help with that.

news.title: Meta’s Oversight Board says account bans lack due process, transparency
news.summary: Meta's board cites "due process" concerns over account bans. It's also pushing Meta to offer clear information about violations and its use in AI in making its determinations.

news.title: Meta rolls out a new AI creator assistant on Facebook
news.summary: Creators often have to parse through charts and dashboards to understand their performance, but with the new AI assistant, they can get quick answers to questions like "When should I post?" and "What are people saying in my comments?"

news.title: Kevin O’Leary agrees to downsize massive Utah data center
news.summary: Kevin O'Leary agreed to halve the size of his planned 40,000-acre data center in Utah amid mounting pressure from residents and activists, as reported earlier by local affiliate ABC4. news.title: Google is letting social media stars customize their search result page
news.summary: Google now lets big creators and publishers in the US claim dedicated profiles in Search to highlight things like videos, articles, and their other profiles online. But this feature won't be available to most people or organizations; Google is limiting it to people with at least 100,000 YouTube subs

news.title: Amazon’s new plan for games: James Bond and AI Snoop Dogg
news.summary: Amazon's gaming strategy has never really been clear. news.title: Belkin’s new Joy-Con grips also boost the Switch 2’s battery life
news.summary: Most of Belkin's Switch 2 accessories are designed to either protect or power up Nintendo's latest handheld, like its Charging Case Pro that actually does both at the same time. Its new multitasking Charging Grip can also add three or four more hours of playtime through an included 10,000mAh battery

news.title: Cash App made a magic wand for contactless payments
news.summary: The convenience of contactless payments can already feel magical, but Cash App is really leaning into that with its latest accessory. news.title: After 11 years at Mars, NASA's MAVEN spacecraft went out with a whisper
news.summary: “I think the team has really experienced the loss of a loved one with the end of the mission.”

news.title: It doesn't feel very agricultural: The 2026 Subaru Solterra review
news.summary: Subaru's badge-engineered SUV remains on sale alongside the new Trailseeker.

news.title: How some data center operators are tackling their water use problems
news.summary: Hyperscalers have come under scrutiny for their impact on water quality and availability.

news.title: My SSN was exposed in a breach at Columbia—a school I have no connection with
news.summary: Columbia admits last year’s data breach exposed victims beyond its students, staff.

news.title: Used Waymo robotaxi batteries become backup storage for power grids
news.summary: Used Waymo batteries will bolster California and Texas energy storage projects.

news.title: The AI IPO Race Heats Up, DOGE Whistleblower Sues Elon Musk, and Instagram Gets Hacked
news.summary: On Uncanny Valley, we dive into the IPO bonanza that the top AI companies are embarking on to the point where some real estate listings are looking for not just regular old cash, but Anthropic stock.

news.title: Phoebe Bridgers Ditched the Internet to Hype Up Her New Music. It’s Working
news.summary: The indie artist has played a string of surprise, small-venue shows with no phones allowed, prompting fans to piece together clues about a potential upcoming album.

news.title: Meta Silently Added Face-Recognition Code for Its Smart Glasses to Millions of Phones
news.summary: Code reviewed by WIRED uncovered an unreleased face-recognition system embedded in Meta’s smart glasses platform. It’s designed to identify people via biometric data stored on users’ phones.

news.title: The TikTok Ban Was Never About TikTok
news.summary: A new documentary chronicles how the app became a stand-in for American anxieties about social media, China, and political power.

news.title: Wave Cash App’s Magic Wand to Pay for Stuff
news.summary: You can tap the star-shaped, NFC-enabled wand at terminals to make contactless payments. It's the first of several tap-to-pay hardware doodads coming from Cash App.
